name: Ubiquiti Enterprise Access Hub
title: Ubiquiti Enterprise Access Hub
short_description: Enterprise-grade access hub with entry and exit control to eight doors and battery backup support
description: Elevate your security measures and streamline access management with the Ubiquiti Enterprise Access Hub (EAH-8), a powerful access control solution designed for enterprise-level applications. This robust hub seamlessly integrates with your existing access control infrastructure, providing centralized control over eight doors and offering a host of advanced features. Its eight lock terminals support both 12V and dry contact locks, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of access control systems. Additionally, eight dedicated inputs for push buttons, motion sensors, and door position sensors enable real-time monitoring and automated door control.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Access Control
detailed_description.text: Elevate your security measures and streamline access management with the Ubiquiti Enterprise Access Hub (EAH-8), a powerful access control solution designed for enterprise-level applications. This robust hub seamlessly integrates with your existing access control infrastructure, providing centralized control over eight doors and offering a host of advanced features. Its eight lock terminals support both 12V and dry contact locks, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of access control systems. Additionally, eight dedicated inputs for push buttons, motion sensors, and door position sensors enable real-time monitoring and automated door control.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text:
8 Lock terminals (12V or Dry)
8+8 x Inputs for request-to-exit devices and door position sensors
8 x PoE ports for Access Readers
4 x AUX terminals for chimes, sirens, or door openers
1 x Battery backup input (32–48V)

detailed_description.heading: Uninterrupted Operation
detailed_description.text:
Safeguard against power outages with the integrated PP45 cable input for backup battery connection. This input supports a 32–48V DC Lead Acid Battery, ensuring uninterrupted operation even in the event of power disruptions. Enterprise Access Hub offers four AUX output relays for connecting external sirens, door openers, or chimes. These relays provide additional control options, allowing you to customize your access control system to suit your specific needs. Moreover, the eight PoE ports cater to Access Readers, simplifying installation and eliminating the need for separate power supplies.

This hub is certified by CE, FCC, and IC, ensuring compliance with international standards for safety and performance. Its design for indoor use only underlines its suitability for a wide range of enterprise environments where secure and reliable access control is paramount. The EAH-8 represents a sophisticated solution for businesses looking to enhance their access control systems with state-of-the-art technology from Ubiquiti.
